author: Nintendo of America
text:
Hyrule Warriors: Age of Imprisonment — Mineru Trailer — Nintendo Switch 2
A Mineru’s Construct amiibo is coming Sept. 17! Curious about Mineru? Play as her in Hyrule Warriors: Age of Imprisonment, available now on Nintendo Switch 2: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/hyrule-warriors-age-of-imprisonment-switch-2/?utm_source=SW-AA&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=S1012-01&utm_id=S1012-01

#NintendoSwitch2 #HyruleWarriors #AgeofImprisonment
